q: Reverse a string in C# — multiple approaches.
Check if a string is a palindrome in C# (case-insensitive, ignore spaces).
Count word frequency in a string in C#.
Check if two strings are anagrams in C# — O(n) approach.
Find the longest common prefix among an array of strings in C#.

Implement string compression in C# (run-length encoding).
Example: "aabcccdddd" → "a2b1c3d4"
Check balanced parentheses in C# using a stack.
Find all permutations of a string in C#.
Find the longest substring without repeating characters in C# using sliding window.

Parse a CSV line in C# correctly handling quoted fields with commas inside.
Example: 'name,"city, state",age' → ["name", "city, state", "age"]
Implement a trie (prefix tree) in C# for efficient string prefix search.

Implement KMP (Knuth-Morris-Pratt) string search algorithm in C#.
Find pattern in text efficiently O(n+m).

Implement a function to decode a string encoded as k[encoded_string].
Example: "3[a]2[bc]" → "aaabcbc", "2[abc]3[cd]ef" → "abcabccdcdcdef"

Given a string containing words, reverse the words but keep each word's characters in order.
Example: "the sky is blue" → "blue is sky the"
Find the minimum window substring in C# — given s and t, find the smallest window in s that contains all chars in t.
